title: The Confusing Dweller
description: This Mod adds a horrorfull Monster that chases you!
body:
Description
A terrifying hostile entity stalks you in the shadows — can you survive the Confusing Dweller?

What this mod adds
The Confusing Dweller is a frightening entity that:

1. Silently hunts players in darkness

2. Climbs walls and breaks certain blocks

3. Applies spooky effects like darkness when nearby

4. Disappears into shadows, leaving eerie silence

5. Can be banished with the crucifix that can be found in a structure.

6. When he was banned ghosts from himself can appear.

7. Requires GeckoLib to function properly

The Confusing Dweller is a terrifying entity that moves silently and unnervingly fast through the shadows. It can climb walls, break certain blocks, and relentlessly pursue its prey. Those who come too close may be overwhelmed by darkness, as the creature seems to draw power from the fear of its victims. After some time, it can vanish into the shadows, leaving an eerie silence behind.

Traits:

Extremely high health and fast movement

Can climb walls and break specific blocks

Inflicts darkness upon nearby players

Vanishes after prolonged engagement

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SPiUgdUklK8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Where you’ll find him
The Confusing Dweller spawns in dark caves and forest shadows — be ready when night falls…

![Requires Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca66f9781ac31717a451a5d92caf6ea4ff4e682c.png)

Installation
Create a Forge profile with Minecraft 1.20.1

Install GeckoLib (required)

Install this Mod

Load your world — the hunt begins!

⚠️ This mod is actively updated

(Other Versions can be found on Curseforge)
